nodes.label: AI as communication refinement tool
nodes.grounding_span: help me rewrite emails before I send them

nodes.label: AI as financial analysis assistant
nodes.grounding_span: ask for the AI to provide pros and cons of each

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness based on domain specificity
nodes.grounding_span: If the AI tool were more specifically catered to loan analysis and comparisons, I would likely be more trusting

nodes.label: AI as objectivity aid in difficult conversations
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me to rein that in and present it in the best way possible

nodes.label: AI integration with spreadsheet data
nodes.grounding_span: I can't directly copy and paste from a spreadsheet to analyze different options

nodes.label: AI as compliance and ethics support
nodes.label_negative: AI replacing human judgment in compliance
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't replace my human judgment on ethics and other areas important to compliance and law

nodes.label: Professional communication effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: make sure I'm not over explaining a topic, providing unnecessary details, or using the wrong tone

nodes.label: Optimal client financial outcome
nodes.grounding_span: what saves the borrower the most amount of money given their circumstances

nodes.label: Professional objectivity and ethical compliance
nodes.grounding_span: I shouldn't necessarily steer them away from the options available to them

nodes.label: Workflow efficiency and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: make a lot of what I do faster and more efficient

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI in communication and objectivity
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me to navigate that conversation in the best way possible, so I was happy with the outcome

nodes.label: Frustration with spreadsheet copy-paste limitation
nodes.grounding_span: One of the only things that frustrates me is that I can't directly copy and paste from a spreadsheet

nodes.label: Conditional trust based on domain specificity
nodes.grounding_span: If the AI tool were more specifically catered to loan analysis and comparisons, I would likely be more trusting

nodes.label: Systematic upfront scenario provision with verification
nodes.grounding_span: I typically try to provide the full scenario up front

nodes.label: Reflective separation of personal bias from professional duty
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it's hard for me to separate my own opinion or feelings, and AI helps me to rein that in
